ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term or name of the genetic pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pathway */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating the significance of the pathway */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted P-value accounting for multiple comparisons */,
  "odds_ratio" REAL /* Odds ratio representing the strength of the association */,
  "combined_score" REAL /* Combined score calculated from various metrics */,
  "enrichment_score" REAL /* Enrichment score indicating the level of enrichment for the pathway */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pathway (e.g., metabolic, signaling) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the pathway (e.g., glycolysis, PI3K/AKT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathways_subcategory FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory") REFERENCES pathway_subcategories ("subcategory_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathways_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES pathway_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., gene expression, genotypes) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset file (e.g., CSV, BED) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis (e.g., Fisher's exact test, GSEA) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value used for the analysis */,
  "permutation_count" INTEGER /* Number of permutations performed for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Details of the analysis result */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the pathway in the analysis */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted P-value of the pathway in the analysis */,
  "enrichment_score" REAL /* Enrichment score of the pathway in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_parameters_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
